THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOODY, CHARLES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 74 SIXTH STREET, #209 S.F., STAYED UNTIL JUN-25-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, FAILURE TO VACATE, DEFT TO PAY $175.00 BACK RENT PLUS $8.67 PER DAY FROM JUNE 2 TO JUNE 25, 1993 PLUS COSTS. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
